summary: Read-only QA accepts the M1 task graph. SIM-001 is the only READY task; SIM-002 through SIM-006 are dependency-gated DRAFT tasks; goal-mode state and systems_architect handoff are valid.

tests_run.result: All six SIM task files are valid.
List shows SIM-001 READY and SIM-002..SIM-006 DRAFT; ready returns only SIM-001.

tests_run.command: JSON parse and shape checks for required state/task/handoff files

decisions: Accept M1 task graph as scoped to deterministic simulation kernel setup.
Accept SIM-001 as the only next dependency-ready task.
Route to lead_orchestrator for integration and SIM-001 dispatch.
risks: Workspace includes an extra untracked route record; lead should intentionally include or exclude it during integration.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted M1 task graph and start SIM-001 under the autonomous goal-mode gates.
